tZh: 基于Transformer的可扩展扩散模型
sEn: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) scale with Gflops and achieve state-of-the-art FID on ImageNet.
sZh: 扩散Transformer（DiT）随Gflops扩展，在ImageNet上达到最先进FID。
absEn: We explore a new class of diffusion models based on the transformer architecture. We train latent diffusion models of images, replacing the commonly-used U-Net backbone with a transformer that operates on latent patches. We analyze the scalability of our Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) through the lens of forward pass complexity as measured by Gflops. We find that DiTs with higher Gflops -- through increased transformer depth/width or increased number of input tokens -- consistently have lower FID. In addition to possessing good scalability properties, our largest DiT-XL/2 models outperform all prior diffusion models on the class-conditional ImageNet 512x512 and 256x256 benchmarks, achieving a state-of-the-art FID of 2.27 on the latter.
absZh: 我们探索了一类基于Transformer架构的新型扩散模型。我们训练图像的潜在扩散模型，用作用于潜在块的Transformer替换常用的U-Net骨干网络。我们通过前向传播复杂度（以Gflops衡量）来分析扩散Transformer（DiT）的可扩展性。我们发现，具有更高Gflops的DiT——通过增加Transformer深度/宽度或增加输入令牌数量——始终具有更低的FID。除了具有良好的可扩展性外，我们最大的DiT-XL/2模型在类别条件ImageNet 512x512和256x256基准测试中优于所有先前的扩散模型，在后者上实现了2.27的最先进FID。

contrib.en: Introduces Diffusion Transformers (DiTs), a new class of diffusion models based on the transformer architecture.
contrib.zh: 提出扩散Transformer（DiT），一种基于Transformer架构的新型扩散模型。

contrib.en: Replaces the commonly-used U-Net backbone with a transformer operating on latent patches, showing U-Net inductive bias is not crucial.
contrib.zh: 用作用于潜在块的Transformer替代常用的U-Net主干，表明U-Net归纳偏置并非关键。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong correlation between model Gflops and sample quality (FID), with higher Gflops consistently yielding lower FID.
contrib.zh: 证明模型Gflops与样本质量（FID）之间存在强相关性，更高的Gflops持续带来更低的FID。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art FID of 2.27 on class-conditional ImageNet 256x256, outperforming all prior diffusion models.
contrib.zh: 在类别条件ImageNet 256x256上实现2.27的FID，超越所有先前扩散模型。

contrib.en: Shows adaLN-Zero conditioning mechanism is most compute-efficient and yields best quality among four block designs.
contrib.zh: 表明adaLN-Zero条件机制计算效率最高，在四种块设计中质量最佳。

contrib.en: Scaling model compute (Gflops) is more critical than parameter count or sampling compute for improving DiT performance.
contrib.zh: 提升模型算力（Gflops）比参数量或采样算力对改进DiT性能更关键。

limits.en: Only evaluated on class-conditional ImageNet at 256x256 and 512x512 resolutions.
limits.zh: 仅在类别条件ImageNet的256x256和512x512分辨率上评估。

limits.en: Uses a fixed pre-trained VAE from Stable Diffusion; DiT's performance may depend on VAE quality.
limits.zh: 使用Stable Diffusion的固定预训练VAE；DiT性能可能依赖VAE质量。

limits.en: Training hyperparameters are largely retained from ADM without extensive tuning for DiT.
limits.zh: 训练超参数主要沿用ADM，未针对DiT进行广泛调优。

limits.en: Scaling analysis limited to Gflops; other complexity metrics like memory or latency not explored.
limits.zh: 缩放分析仅限于Gflops；未探索内存或延迟等其他复杂度指标。

limits.en: Does not address text-to-image generation or other conditional modalities beyond class labels.
limits.zh: 未涉及文本到图像生成或类别标签以外的其他条件模态。

items.en: We explore a new class of diffusion models based on the transformer architecture. We train latent diffusion models of images, replacing the commonly-used U-Net backbone with a transformer that operates on latent patches. We analyze the scalability of our Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) through the lens of forward pass complexity as measured by Gflops. We find that DiTs with higher Gflops—through increased transformer depth/width or increased number of input tokens—consistently have lower FID. In addition to possessing good scalability properties, our largest DiT-XL/2 models outperform all prior diffusion models on the class-conditional ImageNet 512×\times512 and 256×\times256 benchmarks, achieving a state-of-the-art FID of 2.27 on the latter.
items.zh: 我们探索了一类基于Transformer架构的新型扩散模型。我们训练了图像的潜在扩散模型，用操作于潜在块上的Transformer替换了常用的U-Net骨干网络。我们通过前向传递复杂度（以Gflops衡量）的视角分析了扩散Transformer（DiT）的可扩展性。我们发现，具有更高Gflops的DiT——通过增加Transformer深度/宽度或增加输入令牌数量——始终具有更低的FID。除了具有良好的可扩展性外，我们最大的DiT-XL/2模型在类别条件ImageNet 512×512和256×256基准测试上超越了所有先前的扩散模型，在后者上实现了2.27的最先进FID。

items.capEn: Figure 2: ImageNet generation with Diffusion Transformers (DiTs). Bubble area indicates the flops of the diffusion model. Left: FID-50K (lower is better) of our DiT models at 400K training iterations. Performance steadily improves in FID as model flops increase. Right: Our best model, DiT-XL/2, is compute-efficient and outperforms all prior U-Net-based diffusion models, like ADM and LDM.
items.capZh: 图2：使用扩散Transformer（DiT）进行ImageNet生成。气泡面积表示扩散模型的flops。左图：我们的DiT模型在400K训练迭代时的FID-50K（越低越好）。随着模型flops的增加，FID性能稳步提升。右图：我们最好的模型DiT-XL/2计算效率高，并且优于所有先前的基于U-Net的扩散模型，如ADM和LDM。

items.en: Machine learning is experiencing a renaissance powered by transformers. Over the past five years, neural architectures for natural language processing [42, 8], vision [10] and several other domains have largely been subsumed by transformers [60]. Many classes of image-level generative models remain holdouts to the trend, though—while transformers see widespread use in autoregressive models [43, 3, 6, 47], they have seen less adoption in other generative modeling frameworks. For example, diffusion models have been at the forefront of recent advances in image-level generative models [9, 46]; yet, they all adopt a convolutional U-Net architecture as the de-facto choice of backbone.
items.zh: 机器学习正经历由Transformer推动的复兴。在过去五年中，用于自然语言处理[42, 8]、视觉[10]和其他几个领域的神经架构在很大程度上已被Transformer[60]所取代。然而，许多类别的图像级生成模型仍然抵制这一趋势——尽管Transformer在自回归模型[43, 3, 6, 47]中得到广泛使用，但它们在其它生成建模框架中的采用较少。例如，扩散模型一直处于图像级生成模型近期进展的前沿[9, 46]；然而，它们都采用卷积U-Net架构作为骨干网络的默认选择。

items.en: The seminal work of Ho et al. [19] first introduced the U-Net backbone for diffusion models. Having initially seen success within pixel-level autoregressive models and conditional GANs [23], the U-Net was inherited from PixelCNN++ [52, 58] with a few changes. The model is convolutional, comprised primarily of ResNet [15] blocks. In contrast to the standard U-Net [49], additional spatial self-attention blocks, which are essential components in transformers, are interspersed at lower resolutions. Dhariwal and Nichol [9] ablated several architecture choices for the U-Net, such as the use of adaptive normalization layers [40] to inject conditional information and channel counts for convolutional layers. However, the high-level design of the U-Net from Ho et al. has largely remained intact.
items.zh: Ho等人[19]的开创性工作首次将U-Net骨干网络引入扩散模型。U-Net最初在像素级自回归模型和条件GAN[23]中取得成功，它继承自PixelCNN++[52, 58]并做了一些改动。该模型是卷积的，主要由ResNet[15]块组成。与标准U-Net[49]相比，在较低分辨率下插入了额外的空间自注意力块，这些是Transformer中的关键组件。Dhariwal和Nichol[9]对U-Net的几种架构选择进行了消融，例如使用自适应归一化层[40]注入条件信息以及卷积层的通道数。然而，Ho等人提出的U-Net高层设计基本保持不变。

items.en: With this work, we aim to demystify the significance of architectural choices in diffusion models and offer empirical baselines for future generative modeling research. We show that the U-Net inductive bias is not crucial to the performance of diffusion models, and they can be readily replaced with standard designs such as transformers. As a result, diffusion models are well-poised to benefit from the recent trend of architecture unification—e.g., by inheriting best practices and training recipes from other domains, as well as retaining favorable properties like scalability, robustness and efficiency. A standardized architecture would also open up new possibilities for cross-domain research.
items.zh: 通过这项工作，我们旨在阐明扩散模型中架构选择的重要性，并为未来的生成建模研究提供经验基线。我们表明，U-Net的归纳偏置对扩散模型的性能并非至关重要，它们可以很容易地被标准设计（如Transformer）取代。因此，扩散模型完全有能力受益于近期架构统一的趋势——例如，通过继承其他领域的最佳实践和训练方法，以及保留可扩展性、鲁棒性和效率等有利特性。标准化的架构还将为跨领域研究开辟新的可能性。

items.en: In this paper, we focus on a new class of diffusion models based on transformers. We call them Diffusion Transformers, or DiTs for short. DiTs adhere to the best practices of Vision Transformers (ViTs) [10], which have been shown to scale more effectively for visual recognition than traditional convolutional networks (e.g., ResNet [15]).
items.zh: 在本文中，我们专注于一类基于Transformer的新型扩散模型。我们称它们为扩散Transformer，简称DiT。DiT遵循视觉Transformer（ViT）[10]的最佳实践，后者已被证明在视觉识别方面比传统卷积网络（如ResNet[15]）更有效地扩展。

items.en: More specifically, we study the scaling behavior of transformers with respect to network complexity vs. sample quality. We show that by constructing and benchmarking the DiT design space under the Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) [48] framework, where diffusion models are trained within a VAE’s latent space, we can successfully replace the U-Net backbone with a transformer. We further show that DiTs are scalable architectures for diffusion models: there is a strong correlation between the network complexity (measured by Gflops) vs. sample quality (measured by FID). By simply scaling-up DiT and training an LDM with a high-capacity backbone (118.6 Gflops), we are able to achieve a state-of-the-art result of 2.27 FID on the class-conditional 256×256256256256\times 256 ImageNet generation benchmark.
items.zh: 更具体地说，我们研究了Transformer在网络复杂度与样本质量方面的缩放行为。我们表明，通过在潜在扩散模型（LDM）[48]框架下构建和基准测试DiT设计空间——其中扩散模型在VAE的潜在空间内训练——我们可以成功地将U-Net骨干网络替换为Transformer。我们进一步表明，DiT是扩散模型的可扩展架构：网络复杂度（以Gflops衡量）与样本质量（以FID衡量）之间存在强相关性。通过简单地扩展DiT并使用高容量骨干网络（118.6 Gflops）训练LDM，我们能够在类别条件256×256 ImageNet生成基准测试上实现2.27 FID的最先进结果。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture. Left: We train conditional latent DiT models. The input latent is decomposed into patches and processed by several DiT blocks. Right: Details of our DiT blocks. We experiment with variants of standard transformer blocks that incorporate conditioning via adaptive layer norm, cross-attention and extra input tokens. Adaptive layer norm works best.
items.capZh: 图3：扩散Transformer（DiT）架构。左图：我们训练条件潜在DiT模型。输入潜在表示被分解为块，并由几个DiT块处理。右图：我们的DiT块细节。我们实验了标准Transformer块的变体，这些变体通过自适应层归一化、交叉注意力和额外输入令牌来纳入条件。自适应层归一化效果最好。

items.en: Transformers [60] have replaced domain-specific architectures across language, vision [10], reinforcement learning [5, 25] and meta-learning [39]. They have shown remarkable scaling properties under increasing model size, training compute and data in the language domain [26], as generic autoregressive models [17] and as ViTs [63]. Beyond language, transformers have been trained to autoregressively predict pixels [38, 7, 6]. They have also been trained on discrete codebooks [59] as both autoregressive models [11, 47] and masked generative models [4, 14]; the former has shown excellent scaling behavior up to 20B parameters [62]. Finally, transformers have been explored in DDPMs to synthesize non-spatial data; e.g., to generate CLIP image embeddings in DALL⋅⋅\cdotE 2 [46, 41]. In this paper, we study the scaling properties of transformers when used as the backbone of diffusion models of images.
items.zh: Transformer[60]已经取代了语言、视觉[10]、强化学习[5, 25]和元学习[39]等领域的特定领域架构。它们在语言领域[26]、作为通用自回归模型[17]和作为ViT[63]方面，在模型规模、训练算力和数据增加时表现出显著的缩放特性。除了语言之外，Transformer已被训练用于自回归预测像素[38, 7, 6]。它们还在离散码本[59]上作为自回归模型[11, 47]和掩码生成模型[4, 14]进行训练；前者在高达20B参数时表现出优异的缩放行为[62]。最后，Transformer已在DDPM中用于合成非空间数据；例如，在DALL·E 2[46, 41]中生成CLIP图像嵌入。在本文中，我们研究了Transformer作为图像扩散模型骨干网络时的缩放特性。

items.en: Diffusion [54, 19] and score-based generative models [22, 56] have been particularly successful as generative models of images [35, 46, 50, 48], in many cases outperforming generative adversarial networks (GANs) [12] which had previously been state-of-the-art. Improvements in DDPMs over the past two years have largely been driven by improved sampling techniques [19, 55, 27], most notably classifier-free guidance [21], reformulating diffusion models to predict noise instead of pixels [19] and using cascaded DDPM pipelines where low-resolution base diffusion models are trained in parallel with upsamplers [20, 9]. For all the diffusion models listed above, convolutional U-Nets [49] are the de-facto choice of backbone architecture. Concurrent work [24] introduced a novel, efficient architecture based on attention for DDPMs; we explore pure transformers.
items.zh: 扩散[54, 19]和基于分数的生成模型[22, 56]作为图像生成模型[35, 46, 50, 48]特别成功，在许多情况下优于先前最先进的生成对抗网络（GAN）[12]。过去两年中DDPM的改进主要源于改进的采样技术[19, 55, 27]，最值得注意的是无分类器引导[21]、将扩散模型重新表述为预测噪声而非像素[19]以及使用级联DDPM管道（其中低分辨率基础扩散模型与上采样器并行训练）[20, 9]。对于上述所有扩散模型，卷积U-Net[49]是骨干网络的默认选择。并行工作[24]引入了一种基于注意力的新型高效DDPM架构；我们探索纯Transformer。

items.en: When evaluating architecture complexity in the image generation literature, it is fairly common practice to use parameter counts. In general, parameter counts can be poor proxies for the complexity of image models since they do not account for, e.g., image resolution which significantly impacts performance [44, 45]. Instead, much of the model complexity analysis in this paper is through the lens of theoretical Gflops. This brings us in-line with the architecture design literature where Gflops are widely-used to gauge complexity. In practice, the golden complexity metric is still up for debate as it frequently depends on particular application scenarios. Nichol and Dhariwal’s seminal work improving diffusion models [36, 9] is most related to us—there, they analyzed the scalability and Gflop properties of the U-Net architecture class. In this paper, we focus on the transformer class.
items.zh: 在图像生成文献中评估架构复杂度时，使用参数数量是相当常见的做法。一般来说，参数数量可能不是图像模型复杂度的良好代理，因为它们没有考虑例如图像分辨率等显著影响性能的因素[44, 45]。相反，本文中的大部分模型复杂度分析是通过理论Gflops的视角进行的。这使我们与架构设计文献保持一致，其中Gflops被广泛用于衡量复杂度。在实践中，黄金复杂度指标仍有争议，因为它经常取决于特定的应用场景。Nichol和Dhariwal改进扩散模型的开创性工作[36, 9]与我们最相关——在那里，他们分析了U-Net架构类别的可扩展性和Gflops特性。在本文中，我们专注于Transformer类别。

In this setting, classifier-free guidance can be used to encourage the sampling procedure to find x𝑥x such that log⁡p​(c|x)𝑝conditional𝑐𝑥\log p(c|x) is high [21]. By Bayes Rule, log⁡p​(c|x)∝log⁡p​(x|c)−log⁡p​(x)proportional-to𝑝conditional𝑐𝑥𝑝conditional𝑥𝑐𝑝𝑥\log p(c|x)\propto\log p(x|c)-\log p(x), and hence ∇xlog⁡p​(c|x)∝∇xlog⁡p​(x|c)−∇xlog⁡p​(x)proportional-tosubscript∇𝑥𝑝conditional𝑐𝑥subscript∇𝑥𝑝conditional𝑥𝑐subscript∇𝑥𝑝𝑥

By interpreting the output of diffusion models as the score function, the DDPM sampling procedure can be guided to sample x𝑥x with high p​(x|c)𝑝conditional𝑥𝑐p(x|c) by: ϵ^θ​(xt,c)=ϵθ​(xt,∅)+s⋅∇xlog⁡p​(x|c)∝ϵθ​(xt,∅)+s⋅(ϵθ​(xt,c)−ϵθ​(xt,∅))subscript^italic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑐subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡⋅𝑠subscript∇𝑥𝑝conditional𝑥𝑐proportional-tosubscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡⋅𝑠subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑐subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡\hat{\epsilon}_{	heta}(x_{t},c)=\epsilon_{	heta}(x_{t},\emptyset)+s\cdot

Evaluating the diffusion model with c=∅𝑐c=\emptyset is done by randomly dropping out c𝑐c during training and replacing it with a learned “null” embedding ∅\emptyset. Classifier-free guidance is widely-known to yield significantly improved samples over generic sampling techniques [21, 35, 46], and the trend holds for our DiT models.
items.zh: 条件扩散模型将额外信息作为输入，例如类别标签c。在这种情况下，反向过程变为pθ(xt-1|xt,c)，其中ϵθ和Σθ以c为条件。在这种设置下，可以使用无分类器引导来鼓励采样过程找到使得log p(c|x)高的x[21]。根据贝叶斯规则，log p(c|x)∝log p(x|c)-log p(x)，因此∇x log p(c|x)∝∇x log p(x|c)-∇x log p(x)。通过将扩散模型的输出解释为得分函数，DDPM采样过程可以通过以下方式引导以采样高p(x|c)的x：ϵ̂θ(xt,c)=ϵθ(xt,∅)+s·∇x log p(x|c)∝ϵθ(xt,∅)+s·(ϵθ(xt,c)-ϵθ(xt,∅))，其中s>1表示引导的尺度（注意s=1恢复标准采样）。通过在训练期间随机丢弃c并用学习到的“空”嵌入∅替换它，来评估c=∅时的扩散模型。无分类器引导被广泛认为能比通用采样技术产生显著更好的样本[21, 35, 46]，这一趋势对我们的DiT模型也成立。

items.en: Training diffusion models directly in high-resolution pixel space can be computationally prohibitive. Latent diffusion models (LDMs) [48] tackle this issue with a two-stage approach: (1) learn an autoencoder that compresses images into smaller spatial representations with a learned encoder E𝐸E; (2) train a diffusion model of representations z=E​(x)𝑧𝐸𝑥z=E(x) instead of a diffusion model of images x𝑥x (E𝐸E is frozen). New images can then be generated by sampling a representation z𝑧z from the diffusion model and subsequently decoding it to an image with the learned decoder x=D​(z)𝑥𝐷𝑧x=D(z).
items.zh: 直接在高分辨率像素空间中训练扩散模型在计算上可能非常昂贵。潜在扩散模型（LDM）[48]通过两阶段方法解决了这个问题：（1）学习一个自动编码器，该编码器使用学习到的编码器E将图像压缩成更小的空间表示；（2）训练表示z=E(x)的扩散模型，而不是图像x的扩散模型（E被冻结）。然后，可以通过从扩散模型采样表示z，随后使用学习到的解码器x=D(z)将其解码为图像来生成新图像。

items.en: As shown in Figure 2, LDMs achieve good performance while using a fraction of the Gflops of pixel space diffusion models like ADM. Since we are concerned with compute efficiency, this makes them an appealing starting point for architecture exploration. In this paper, we apply DiTs to latent space, although they could be applied to pixel space without modification as well. This makes our image generation pipeline a hybrid-based approach; we use off-the-shelf convolutional VAEs and transformer-based DDPMs.
items.zh: 如图2所示，LDM在使用像素空间扩散模型（如ADM）的一小部分Gflops时实现了良好的性能。由于我们关注计算效率，这使得它们成为架构探索的有吸引力的起点。在本文中，我们将DiT应用于潜在空间，尽管它们也可以不加修改地应用于像素空间。这使得我们的图像生成流程成为一种基于混合的方法；我们使用现成的卷积VAE和基于Transformer的DDPM。

items.en: We introduce Diffusion Transformers (DiTs), a new architecture for diffusion models. We aim to be as faithful to the standard transformer architecture as possible to retain its scaling properties. Since our focus is training DDPMs of images (specifically, spatial representations of images), DiT is based on the Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture which operates on sequences of patches [10]. DiT retains many of the best practices of ViTs. Figure 3 shows an overview of the complete DiT architecture. In this section, we describe the forward pass of DiT, as well as the components of the design space of the DiT class.
items.zh: 我们引入了扩散Transformer（DiT），一种用于扩散模型的新架构。我们旨在尽可能忠实于标准Transformer架构，以保留其缩放特性。由于我们的重点是训练图像的DDPM（具体来说，图像的空间表示），DiT基于视觉Transformer（ViT）架构，该架构操作于块序列[10]。DiT保留了ViT的许多最佳实践。图3显示了完整DiT架构的概览。在本节中，我们描述DiT的前向传递，以及DiT类设计空间的组成部分。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Input specifications for DiT. Given patch size p×p𝑝𝑝p\times p, a spatial representation (the noised latent from the VAE) of shape I×I×C𝐼𝐼𝐶I\times I\times C is “patchified” into a sequence of length T=(I/p)2𝑇superscript𝐼𝑝2T=(I/p)^{2} with hidden dimension d𝑑d. A smaller patch size p𝑝p results in a longer sequence length and thus more Gflops.
items.capZh: 图4：DiT的输入规格。给定块大小p×p，形状为I×I×C的空间表示（来自VAE的加噪潜在表示）被“块化”为长度为T=(I/p)^2、隐藏维度为d的序列。较小的块大小p会导致更长的序列长度，从而产生更多的Gflops。

items.en: The input to DiT is a spatial representation z𝑧z (for 256×256×32562563256\times 256\times 3 images, z𝑧z has shape 32×32×43232432\times 32\times 4). The first layer of DiT is “patchify,” which converts the spatial input into a sequence of T𝑇T tokens, each of dimension d𝑑d, by linearly embedding each patch in the input. Following patchify, we apply standard ViT frequency-based positional embeddings (the sine-cosine version) to all input tokens. The number of tokens T𝑇T created by patchify is determined by the patch size hyperparameter p𝑝p. As shown in Figure 4, halving p𝑝p will quadruple T𝑇T, and thus at least quadruple total transformer Gflops. Although it has a significant impact on Gflops, note that changing p𝑝p has no meaningful impact on downstream parameter counts.
items.zh: DiT的输入是一个空间表示z（对于256×256×3的图像，z的形状为32×32×4）。DiT的第一层是“块化”，它通过线性嵌入输入中的每个块，将空间输入转换为T个令牌的序列，每个令牌维度为d。在块化之后，我们将标准的ViT基于频率的位置嵌入（正弦-余弦版本）应用于所有输入令牌。块化创建的令牌数量T由块大小超参数p决定。如图4所示，将p减半将使T增加四倍，因此至少使总Transformer Gflops增加四倍。尽管它对Gflops有显著影响，但请注意改变p对下游参数数量没有有意义的影响。

items.en: We add p=2,4,8𝑝248p=2,4,8 to the DiT design space.
items.zh: 我们将p=2,4,8添加到DiT设计空间中。

items.en: Following patchify, the input tokens are processed by a sequence of transformer blocks. In addition to noised image inputs, diffusion models sometimes process additional conditional information such as noise timesteps t𝑡t, class labels c𝑐c, natural language, etc. We explore four variants of transformer blocks that process conditional inputs differently. The designs introduce small, but important, modifications to the standard ViT block design. The designs of all blocks are shown in Figure 3.
items.zh: 在分块处理后，输入令牌由一系列Transformer块处理。除了带噪声的图像输入外，扩散模型有时还会处理额外的条件信息，例如噪声时间步t、类别标签c、自然语言等。我们探索了四种不同处理条件输入的Transformer块变体。这些设计对标准ViT块设计进行了微小但重要的修改。所有块的设计如图3所示。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Comparing different conditioning strategies. adaLN-Zero outperforms cross-attention and in-context conditioning at all stages of training.
items.capZh: 图5：比较不同的条件化策略。adaLN-Zero在训练的所有阶段都优于交叉注意力和上下文内条件化。

items.en: In-context conditioning. We simply append the vector embeddings of t𝑡t and c𝑐c as two additional tokens in the input sequence, treating them no differently from the image tokens. This is similar to cls tokens in ViTs, and it allows us to use standard ViT blocks without modification. After the final block, we remove the conditioning tokens from the sequence. This approach introduces negligible new Gflops to the model.
items.zh: 上下文内条件化。我们简单地将t和c的向量嵌入作为两个额外的令牌附加到输入序列中，将它们与图像令牌同等对待。这类似于ViT中的cls令牌，并且允许我们使用未经修改的标准ViT块。在最后一个块之后，我们从序列中移除条件令牌。这种方法为模型增加了可忽略的新Gflops。

items.en: Cross-attention block. We concatenate the embeddings of t𝑡t and c𝑐c into a length-two sequence, separate from the image token sequence. The transformer block is modified to include an additional multi-head cross-attention layer following the multi-head self-attention block, similar to the original design from Vaswani et al. [60], and also similar to the one used by LDM for conditioning on class labels. Cross-attention adds the most Gflops to the model, roughly a 15% overhead.
items.zh: 交叉注意力块。我们将t和c的嵌入连接成一个长度为2的序列，与图像令牌序列分开。Transformer块被修改为在多头自注意力块之后包含一个额外的多头交叉注意力层，类似于Vaswani等人[60]的原始设计，也类似于LDM用于类别标签条件化的设计。交叉注意力为模型增加了最多的Gflops，大约15%的开销。

items.en: Adaptive layer norm (adaLN) block. Following the widespread usage of adaptive normalization layers [40] in GANs [2, 28] and diffusion models with U-Net backbones [9], we explore replacing standard layer norm layers in transformer blocks with adaptive layer norm (adaLN). Rather than directly learn dimension-wise scale and shift parameters γ𝛾\gamma and β𝛽\beta, we regress them from the sum of the embedding vectors of t𝑡t and c𝑐c. Of the three block designs we explore, adaLN adds the least Gflops and is thus the most compute-efficient. It is also the only conditioning mechanism that is restricted to apply the same function to all tokens.
items.zh: 自适应层归一化（adaLN）块。遵循自适应归一化层[40]在GANs[2,28]和具有U-Net骨干的扩散模型[9]中的广泛使用，我们探索用自适应层归一化（adaLN）替换Transformer块中的标准层归一化层。我们不直接学习维度级的缩放参数γ和偏移参数β，而是从t和c的嵌入向量之和回归它们。在我们探索的三种块设计中，adaLN增加的Gflops最少，因此计算效率最高。它也是唯一限制对所有令牌应用相同函数的条件化机制。

items.en: adaLN-Zero block. Prior work on ResNets has found that initializing each residual block as the identity function is beneficial. For example, Goyal et al. found that zero-initializing the final batch norm scale factor γ𝛾\gamma in each block accelerates large-scale training in the supervised learning setting [13]. Diffusion U-Net models use a similar initialization strategy, zero-initializing the final convolutional layer in each block prior to any residual connections. We explore a modification of the adaLN DiT block which does the same. In addition to regressing γ𝛾\gamma and β𝛽\beta, we also regress dimension-wise scaling parameters α𝛼\alpha that are applied immediately prior to any residual connections within the DiT block. We initialize the MLP to output the zero-vector for all α𝛼\alpha; this initializes the full DiT block as the identity function. As with the vanilla adaLN block, adaLN-Zero adds negligible Gflops to the model.
items.zh: adaLN-Zero块。先前关于ResNet的工作发现，将每个残差块初始化为恒等函数是有益的。例如，Goyal等人发现，在监督学习设置中，将每个块中最终的批归一化缩放因子γ初始化为零可以加速大规模训练[13]。扩散U-Net模型使用类似的初始化策略，在任何残差连接之前将每个块中最终的卷积层初始化为零。我们探索了adaLN DiT块的一个修改版本，它做了同样的事情。除了回归γ和β之外，我们还回归维度级的缩放参数α，这些参数在DiT块内的任何残差连接之前立即应用。我们将MLP初始化为对所有α输出零向量；这将整个DiT块初始化为恒等函数。与普通的adaLN块一样，adaLN-Zero为模型增加了可忽略的Gflops。

items.en: We include the in-context, cross-attention, adaptive layer norm and adaLN-Zero blocks in the DiT design space.
items.zh: 我们在DiT设计空间中包含了上下文内、交叉注意力、自适应层归一化和adaLN-Zero块。

items.en: We apply a sequence of N𝑁N DiT blocks, each operating at the hidden dimension size d𝑑d. Following ViT, we use standard transformer configs that jointly scale N𝑁N, d𝑑d and attention heads [10, 63]. Specifically, we use four configs: DiT-S, DiT-B, DiT-L and DiT-XL. They cover a wide range of model sizes and flop allocations, from 0.3 to 118.6 Gflops, allowing us to gauge scaling performance. Table 1 gives details of the configs.
items.zh: 我们应用一个由N个DiT块组成的序列，每个块在隐藏维度大小d下操作。遵循ViT，我们使用联合缩放N、d和注意力头的标准Transformer配置[10,63]。具体来说，我们使用四种配置：DiT-S、DiT-B、DiT-L和DiT-XL。它们涵盖了从0.3到118.6 Gflops的广泛模型大小和flop分配，使我们能够评估缩放性能。表1给出了配置的详细信息。

items.en: We add B, S, L and XL configs to the DiT design space.
items.zh: 我们将B、S、L和XL配置添加到DiT设计空间中。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Scaling the DiT model improves FID at all stages of training. We show FID-50K over training iterations for 12 of our DiT models. Top row: We compare FID holding patch size constant. Bottom row: We compare FID holding model size constant. Scaling the transformer backbone yields better generative models across all model sizes and patch sizes.
items.capZh: 图6：缩放DiT模型在训练的所有阶段都改善了FID。我们展示了12个DiT模型在训练迭代中的FID-50K。顶行：我们比较了保持块大小恒定的FID。底行：我们比较了保持模型大小恒定的FID。缩放Transformer骨干在所有模型大小和块大小下都产生了更好的生成模型。

items.en: After the final DiT block, we need to decode our sequence of image tokens into an output noise prediction and an output diagonal covariance prediction. Both of these outputs have shape equal to the original spatial input. We use a standard linear decoder to do this; we apply the final layer norm (adaptive if using adaLN) and linearly decode each token into a p×p×2​C𝑝𝑝2𝐶p\times p\times 2C tensor, where C𝐶C is the number of channels in the spatial input to DiT. Finally, we rearrange the decoded tokens into their original spatial layout to get the predicted noise and covariance.
items.zh: 在最后一个DiT块之后，我们需要将图像令牌序列解码为输出噪声预测和输出对角协方差预测。这两个输出的形状都等于原始空间输入。我们使用标准的线性解码器来实现这一点；我们应用最终的层归一化（如果使用adaLN则为自适应），并将每个令牌线性解码为一个p×p×2C张量，其中C是DiT空间输入的通道数。最后，我们将解码后的令牌重新排列成其原始空间布局，以得到预测的噪声和协方差。

items.en: The complete DiT design space we explore is patch size, transformer block architecture and model size.
items.zh: 我们探索的完整DiT设计空间包括块大小、Transformer块架构和模型大小。

items.en: We explore the DiT design space and study the scaling properties of our model class. Our models are named according to their configs and latent patch sizes p𝑝p; for example, DiT-XL/2 refers to the XLarge config and p=2𝑝2p=2.
items.zh: 我们探索了DiT设计空间，并研究了模型类别的缩放特性。我们的模型根据其配置和潜在块大小p命名；例如，DiT-XL/2指的是XLarge配置和p=2。

items.en: We train class-conditional latent DiT models at 256×256256256256\times 256 and 512×512512512512\times 512 image resolution on the ImageNet dataset [31], a highly-competitive generative modeling benchmark. We initialize the final linear layer with zeros and otherwise use standard weight initialization techniques from ViT. We train all models with AdamW [33, 29]. We use a constant learning rate of 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4}, no weight decay and a batch size of 256. The only data augmentation we use is horizontal flips. Unlike much prior work with ViTs [57, 61], we did not find learning rate warmup nor regularization necessary to train DiTs to high performance. Even without these techniques, training was highly stable across all model configs and we did not observe any loss spikes commonly seen when training transformers. Following common practice in the generative modeling literature, we maintain an exponential moving average (EMA) of DiT weights over training with a decay of 0.9999. All results reported use the EMA model. We use identical training hyperparameters across all DiT model sizes and patch sizes. Our training hyperparameters are almost entirely retained from ADM. We did not tune learning rates, decay/warm-up schedules, Adam β1subscript𝛽1\beta_{1}/β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2} or weight decays.
items.zh: 我们在ImageNet数据集[31]上训练类别条件的潜在DiT模型，图像分辨率为256×256和512×512，这是一个高度竞争的生成建模基准。我们将最终线性层初始化为零，否则使用ViT的标准权重初始化技术。我们使用AdamW[33,29]训练所有模型。我们使用恒定的学习率1×10^{-4}，无权重衰减，批量大小为256。我们使用的唯一数据增强是水平翻转。与许多先前使用ViT的工作[57,61]不同，我们发现学习率预热或正则化对于训练DiT达到高性能并非必要。即使没有这些技术，训练在所有模型配置下都高度稳定，我们没有观察到训练Transformer时常见的损失尖峰。遵循生成建模文献中的常见做法，我们在训练过程中以0.9999的衰减维护DiT权重的指数移动平均（EMA）。所有报告的结果都使用EMA模型。我们在所有DiT模型大小和块大小上使用相同的训练超参数。我们的训练超参数几乎完全来自ADM。我们没有调整学习率、衰减/预热计划、Adam β1/β2或权重衰减。

items.en: We use an off-the-shelf pre-trained variational autoencoder (VAE) model [30] from Stable Diffusion [48]. The VAE encoder has a downsample factor of 8—given an RGB image x𝑥x with shape 256×256×32562563256\times 256\times 3, z=E​(x)𝑧𝐸𝑥z=E(x) has shape 32×32×43232432\times 32\times 4. Across all experiments in this section, our diffusion models operate in this 𝒵𝒵\mathcal{Z}-space. After sampling a new latent from our diffusion model, we decode it to pixels using the VAE decoder x=D​(z)𝑥𝐷𝑧x=D(z). We retain diffusion hyperparameters from ADM [9]; specifically, we use a tmax=1000subscript𝑡max1000t_{\text{max}}=1000 linear variance schedule ranging from 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4} to 2×10−22superscript1022\times 10^{-2}, ADM’s parameterization of the covariance ΣθsubscriptΣ𝜃\Sigma_{\theta} and their method for embedding input timesteps and labels.
items.zh: 我们使用来自Stable Diffusion [48]的现成预训练变分自编码器（VAE）模型[30]。VAE编码器的下采样因子为8——给定一个形状为256×256×3的RGB图像x，z=E(x)的形状为32×32×4。在本节的所有实验中，我们的扩散模型在这个Z空间中操作。从我们的扩散模型采样新的潜在表示后，我们使用VAE解码器x=D(z)将其解码为像素。我们保留了ADM[9]的扩散超参数；具体来说，我们使用t_max=1000的线性方差调度，范围从1×10^{-4}到2×10^{-2}，ADM的协方差Σθ参数化，以及它们嵌入输入时间步和标签的方法。

items.en: We measure scaling performance with Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) [18], the standard metric for evaluating generative models of images.
items.zh: 我们使用Fréchet Inception Distance（FID）[18]来衡量缩放性能，这是评估图像生成模型的标准指标。

items.en: We follow convention when comparing against prior works and report FID-50K using 250 DDPM sampling steps. FID is known to be sensitive to small implementation details [37]; to ensure accurate comparisons, all values reported in this paper are obtained by exporting samples and using ADM’s TensorFlow evaluation suite [9]. FID numbers reported in this section do not use classifier-free guidance except where otherwise stated. We additionally report Inception Score [51], sFID [34] and Precision/Recall [32] as secondary metrics.
items.zh: 在与先前工作比较时，我们遵循惯例，使用250步DDPM采样报告FID-50K。已知FID对小的实现细节敏感[37]；为确保准确比较，本文报告的所有值均通过导出样本并使用ADM的TensorFlow评估套件[9]获得。本节报告的FID数字除非另有说明，否则不使用无分类器指导。我们还报告了Inception Score [51]、sFID [34]和Precision/Recall [32]作为次要指标。

items.en: We implement all models in JAX [1] and train them using TPU-v3 pods. DiT-XL/2, our most compute-intensive model, trains at roughly 5.7 iterations/second on a TPU v3-256 pod with a global batch size of 256.
items.zh: 我们在JAX [1]中实现所有模型，并使用TPU-v3 pods进行训练。DiT-XL/2是我们计算最密集的模型，在TPU v3-256 pod上以全局批量大小256训练，大约每秒5.7次迭代。

items.en: We train four of our highest Gflop DiT-XL/2 models, each using a different block design—in-context (119.4 Gflops), cross-attention (137.6 Gflops), adaptive layer norm (adaLN, 118.6 Gflops) or adaLN-zero (118.6 Gflops). We measure FID over the course of training. Figure 5 shows the results. The adaLN-Zero block yields lower FID than both cross-attention and in-context conditioning while being the most compute-efficient. At 400K training iterations, the FID achieved with the adaLN-Zero model is nearly half that of the in-context model, demonstrating that the conditioning mechanism critically affects model quality. Initialization is also important—adaLN-Zero, which initializes each DiT block as the identity function, significantly outperforms vanilla adaLN. For the rest of the paper, all models will use adaLN-Zero DiT blocks.
items.zh: 我们训练了四个最高Gflop的DiT-XL/2模型，每个使用不同的块设计——上下文内（119.4 Gflops）、交叉注意力（137.6 Gflops）、自适应层归一化（adaLN，118.6 Gflops）或adaLN-zero（118.6 Gflops）。我们在训练过程中测量FID。图5显示了结果。adaLN-Zero块在计算效率最高的同时，比交叉注意力和上下文内条件化产生了更低的FID。在400K训练迭代时，adaLN-Zero模型实现的FID几乎是上下文内模型的一半，表明条件化机制对模型质量有重要影响。初始化也很重要——将每个DiT块初始化为恒等函数的adaLN-Zero显著优于普通adaLN。在本文的其余部分，所有模型将使用adaLN-Zero DiT块。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Increasing transformer forward pass Gflops increases sample quality. Best viewed zoomed-in. We sample from all 12 of our DiT models after 400K training steps using the same input latent noise and class label. Increasing the Gflops in the model—either by increasing transformer depth/width or increasing the number of input tokens—yields significant improvements in visual fidelity.
items.capZh: 图7：增加Transformer前向传递Gflops提高了样本质量。最佳查看方式为放大。我们在400K训练步骤后，使用相同的输入潜在噪声和类别标签，从所有12个DiT模型中采样。增加模型中的Gflops——无论是通过增加Transformer深度/宽度还是增加输入令牌数量——都显著提高了视觉保真度。

items.en: We train 12 DiT models, sweeping over model configs (S, B, L, XL) and patch sizes (8, 4, 2). Note that DiT-L and DiT-XL are significantly closer to each other in terms of relative Gflops than other configs. Figure 2 (left) gives an overview of the Gflops of each model and their FID at 400K training iterations. In all cases, we find that increasing model size and decreasing patch size yields considerably improved diffusion models.
items.zh: 我们训练了12个DiT模型，覆盖了模型配置（S、B、L、XL）和补丁大小（8、4、2）。注意，DiT-L和DiT-XL在相对Gflops方面比其他配置更接近。图2（左）给出了每个模型的Gflops及其在400K训练迭代时的FID概览。在所有情况下，我们发现增加模型大小和减小补丁大小能显著改进扩散模型。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Transformer Gflops are strongly correlated with FID. We plot the Gflops of each of our DiT models and each model’s FID-50K after 400K training steps.
items.capZh: 图8：Transformer Gflops与FID强相关。我们绘制了每个DiT模型的Gflops以及每个模型在400K训练步骤后的FID-50K。

items.en: The results of Figure 6 suggest that parameter counts do not uniquely determine the quality of a DiT model. As model size is held constant and patch size is decreased, the transformer’s total parameters are effectively unchanged (actually, total parameters slightly decrease), and only Gflops are increased. These results indicate that scaling model Gflops is actually the key to improved performance. To investigate this further, we plot the FID-50K at 400K training steps against model Gflops in Figure 8. The results demonstrate that different DiT configs obtain similar FID values when their total Gflops are similar (e.g., DiT-S/2 and DiT-B/4). We find a strong negative correlation between model Gflops and FID-50K, suggesting that additional model compute is the critical ingredient for improved DiT models. In Figure 12 (appendix), we find that this trend holds for other metrics such as Inception Score.
items.zh: 图6的结果表明，参数量并不能唯一决定DiT模型的质量。当模型大小保持不变而补丁大小减小时，Transformer的总参数实际上保持不变（实际上总参数略有减少），只有Gflops增加。这些结果表明，缩放模型Gflops实际上是提升性能的关键。为了进一步研究这一点，我们在图8中绘制了400K训练步骤时的FID-50K与模型Gflops的关系。结果表明，不同DiT配置在总Gflops相似时获得相似的FID值（例如，DiT-S/2和DiT-B/4）。我们发现模型Gflops与FID-50K之间存在强负相关，这表明额外的模型算力是改进DiT模型的关键因素。在图12（附录）中，我们发现这一趋势在其他指标（如Inception Score）上也成立。

items.en: Larger DiT models are more compute-efficient. In Figure 9, we plot FID as a function of total training compute for all DiT models. We estimate training compute as model Gflops ⋅⋅\cdot batch size ⋅⋅\cdot training steps ⋅⋅\cdot 3, where the factor of 3 roughly approximates the backwards pass as being twice as compute-heavy as the forward pass. We find that small DiT models, even when trained longer, eventually become compute-inefficient relative to larger DiT models trained for fewer steps. Similarly, we find that models that are identical except for patch size have different performance profiles even when controlling for training Gflops. For example, XL/4 is outperformed by XL/2 after roughly 1010superscript101010^{10} Gflops.
items.zh: 更大的DiT模型在算力效率上更高。在图9中，我们绘制了所有DiT模型的FID随总训练算力的变化。我们将训练算力估计为模型Gflops ⋅⋅ 批量大小 ⋅⋅ 训练步骤 ⋅⋅ 3，其中因子3大致近似反向传播的算力消耗是前向传播的两倍。我们发现，小DiT模型即使训练更长时间，最终也会变得比训练步骤更少的大DiT模型算力效率更低。类似地，我们发现除了补丁大小外完全相同的模型，在控制训练Gflops时具有不同的性能曲线。例如，XL/4在大约10^10 Gflops后被XL/2超越。

items.en: We visualize the effect of scaling on sample quality in Figure 7. At 400K training steps, we sample an image from each of our 12 DiT models using identical starting noise xtmaxsubscript𝑥subscript𝑡maxx_{t_{\text{max}}}, sampling noise and class labels. This lets us visually interpret how scaling affects DiT sample quality. Indeed, scaling both model size and the number of tokens yields notable improvements in visual quality.
items.zh: 我们在图7中可视化了缩放对样本质量的影响。在400K训练步骤时，我们使用相同的起始噪声x_t_max、采样噪声和类别标签，从每个DiT模型中采样一张图像。这让我们可以直观地解释缩放如何影响DiT样本质量。确实，同时缩放模型大小和token数量在视觉质量上带来了显著改进。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Larger DiT models use large compute more efficiently. We plot FID as a function of total training compute.
items.capZh: 图9：更大的DiT模型更高效地利用大算力。我们绘制了FID随总训练算力的变化。

items.en: Following our scaling analysis, we continue training our highest Gflop model, DiT-XL/2, for 7M steps. We show samples from the model in Figures 1, and we compare against state-of-the-art class-conditional generative models. We report results in Table 3. When using classifier-free guidance, DiT-XL/2 outperforms all prior diffusion models, decreasing the previous best FID-50K of 3.60 achieved by LDM to 2.27. Figure 2 (right) shows that DiT-XL/2 (118.6 Gflops) is compute-efficient relative to latent space U-Net models like LDM-4 (103.6 Gflops) and substantially more efficient than pixel space U-Net models such as ADM (1120 Gflops) or ADM-U (742 Gflops). Our method achieves the lowest FID of all prior generative models, including the previous state-of-the-art StyleGAN-XL [53]. Finally, we also observe that DiT-XL/2 achieves higher recall values at all tested classifier-free guidance scales compared to LDM-4 and LDM-8. When trained for only 2.35M steps (similar to ADM), XL/2 still outperforms all prior diffusion models with an FID of 2.55.
items.zh: 在缩放分析之后，我们继续训练我们最高Gflop的模型DiT-XL/2，共7M步。我们在图1中展示了该模型的样本，并与最先进的类别条件生成模型进行了比较。我们在表3中报告了结果。当使用无分类器引导时，DiT-XL/2优于所有先前的扩散模型，将之前由LDM实现的最佳FID-50K从3.60降低到2.27。图2（右）显示，DiT-XL/2（118.6 Gflops）相对于潜在空间U-Net模型（如LDM-4，103.6 Gflops）算力效率更高，并且远优于像素空间U-Net模型（如ADM，1120 Gflops或ADM-U，742 Gflops）。我们的方法在所有先前的生成模型中取得了最低的FID，包括之前最先进的StyleGAN-XL [53]。最后，我们还观察到，在所有测试的无分类器引导尺度下，DiT-XL/2相比LDM-4和LDM-8实现了更高的召回率。当仅训练2.35M步（与ADM类似）时，XL/2仍然以2.55的FID优于所有先前的扩散模型。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Scaling-up sampling compute does not compensate for a lack of model compute. For each of our DiT models trained for 400K iterations, we compute FID-10K using [16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 1000] sampling steps. For each number of steps, we plot the FID as well as the Gflops used to sample each image. Small models cannot close the performance gap with our large models, even if they sample with more test-time Gflops than the large models.
items.capZh: 图10：增加采样算力无法弥补模型算力的不足。对于每个训练了400K迭代的DiT模型，我们使用[16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 1000]个采样步骤计算FID-10K。对于每个步骤数，我们绘制了FID以及采样每张图像所用的Gflops。小模型无法缩小与大模型的性能差距，即使它们使用的测试时Gflops比大模型更多。

items.en: We train a new DiT-XL/2 model on ImageNet at 512×512512512512\times 512 resolution for 3M iterations with identical hyperparameters as the 256×256256256256\times 256 model. With a patch size of 2, this XL/2 model processes a total of 1024 tokens after patchifying the 64×64×46464464\times 64\times 4 input latent (524.6 Gflops). Table 3 shows comparisons against state-of-the-art methods. XL/2 again outperforms all prior diffusion models at this resolution, improving the previous best FID of 3.85 achieved by ADM to 3.04. Even with the increased number of tokens, XL/2 remains compute-efficient. For example, ADM uses 1983 Gflops and ADM-U uses 2813 Gflops; XL/2 uses 524.6 Gflops. We show samples from the high-resolution XL/2 model in Figure 1 and the appendix.
items.zh: 我们在ImageNet上以512×512分辨率训练了一个新的DiT-XL/2模型，共3M次迭代，超参数与256×256模型相同。补丁大小为2时，该XL/2模型在将64×64×4输入潜在变量分块后处理总共1024个token（524.6 Gflops）。表3显示了与最先进方法的比较。XL/2在此分辨率下再次优于所有先前的扩散模型，将之前由ADM实现的最佳FID从3.85改进到3.04。即使token数量增加，XL/2仍然算力高效。例如，ADM使用1983 Gflops，ADM-U使用2813 Gflops；XL/2使用524.6 Gflops。我们在图1和附录中展示了高分辨率XL/2模型的样本。

items.en: Diffusion models are unique in that they can use additional compute after training by increasing the number of sampling steps when generating an image. Given the impact of model Gflops on sample quality, in this section we study if smaller-model compute DiTs can outperform larger ones by using more sampling compute. We compute FID for all 12 of our DiT models after 400K training steps, using [16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 1000] sampling steps per-image. The main results are in Figure 10. Consider DiT-L/2 using 1000 sampling steps versus DiT-XL/2 using 128 steps. In this case, L/2 uses 80.780.780.7 Tflops to sample each image; XL/2 uses 5×5\times less compute—15.215.215.2 Tflops—to sample each image. Nonetheless, XL/2 has the better FID-10K (23.7 vs 25.9). In general, scaling-up sampling compute cannot compensate for a lack of model compute.
items.zh: 扩散模型的一个独特之处在于，它们可以在训练后通过增加生成图像时的采样步骤数来使用额外的算力。考虑到模型Gflops对样本质量的影响，本节我们研究较小算力的DiT模型是否可以通过使用更多采样算力来超越较大模型。我们计算了所有12个DiT模型在400K训练步骤后，每张图像使用[16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 1000]个采样步骤的FID。主要结果在图10中。考虑使用1000个采样步骤的DiT-L/2与使用128个步骤的DiT-XL/2。在这种情况下，L/2每张图像使用80.7 Tflops；XL/2每张图像使用的算力少5倍——15.2 Tflops。尽管如此，XL/2的FID-10K更好（23.7 vs 25.9）。总的来说，增加采样算力无法弥补模型算力的不足。

items.en: We introduce Diffusion Transformers (DiTs), a simple transformer-based backbone for diffusion models that outperforms prior U-Net models and inherits the excellent scaling properties of the transformer model class. Given the promising scaling results in this paper, future work should continue to scale DiTs to larger models and token counts. DiT could also be explored as a drop-in backbone for text-to-image models like DALL⋅⋅\cdotE 2 and Stable Diffusion.
items.zh: 我们引入了扩散Transformer（DiT），一种简单的基于Transformer的扩散模型骨干网络，它优于先前的U-Net模型，并继承了Transformer模型类优秀的缩放特性。鉴于本文中令人鼓舞的缩放结果，未来的工作应继续将DiT扩展到更大的模型和token数量。DiT也可以作为即插即用的骨干网络用于文本到图像模型，如DALL·E 2和Stable Diffusion。
